creator: sob@academ.com
text:
When trying to install /usr/lang/java/diablo-jdk15 or /usr/lang/java/diablo-jdk16 (and unless the use of the timezone update is disabled), the timezone updater has been updated to release 1.3.31-2010i. The Makefile needs to updated and the port needs to be retested

How-To-Repeat: 	cd /usr/lang/java/diablo-jdk15 or /usr/lang/java/diable-jdk16 and type make. Use the default options.
